description: Letter requesting charity in which the petitioner describes that he is unemployed, starving, from a distant land (al-Raḥba), and has ‘uncovered his face’ to the addressee. The location al-Raḥba may refer to the medieval fortress town in eastern Syria on the Euphrates (near modern-day al-Miyādīn). There is also a village Raḥba in northern Lebanon. EMS/MCD. NB: This was previously listed as T-S 8J16.29 on PGP.
description_he: מכתב בקשת צדקה: הכותב מובטל, רעב, מארץ רחוקה (אל-רחבה שבסוריה), וחשף פניו (נכנע) לנמען.
